title: dryopteris contermina
intro: Dryopteris contermina, also known as Eastern Hay-scented Fern or Variable Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is native to Eastern North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Dryopteris contermina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or a solvent.
